productDisplayName: Citizen Men Grey Dial Eco-Drive Watch AW1070-04H
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular stainless steel round case with a brown bezel, stainless steel backDial style: Grey dial with hour, minute and seconds hands and markingsFeatures: Date aperture, Eco-Drive technology, a screw to adjust the featuresStrap style: Brown leather strap with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Citizen caseWarranty: One year international warranty and three years, three months and three days warranty in India against manufacturing defects
